Multiple trees on the edge of the cemetery overhang the sidewalk. Your height is not a concern. Apples are tiny and surprisingly sweet, but no one ever harvests them. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: August-October.

Spy Pond Park, 56 Pond Ln, Arlington, MA 02474, USA
Several serviceberry trees in spy pond park, with the most fruitful one by the parking lot and the playground. They all have the cedar-apple rust, but unaffected berries are fine to eat.
